info.title: NPShop
info.author: Arthur Freitas
info.details:
NPShop is a homebrew library manager for the Nintendo Switch that allows users to browse, download and manage community content directly from their console.

The application provides an integrated interface for discovering and installing homebrew applications, mods, translations and cheats, while also helping users organize their existing library.

NPShop is designed to simplify the process of managing homebrew software by providing a fast and user-friendly interface optimized for the Nintendo Switch.

Features include:

• Homebrew browser with searchable library
• Direct downloads from integrated repositories
• Automatic detection of updates and additional content
• Cheat compatibility checking based on game version
• Translation patch distribution
• Save management tools
• Simple and intuitive user interface designed for controller navigation

The project aims to provide a centralized tool for managing community-driven content on the Nintendo Switch while maintaining a smooth and reliable user experience.

changelog:
Version 2.2.7

New Features
• Automatic detection and management of updates, DLC and additional content available on the server
• Initial implementation of cheat downloads with compatibility verification based on installed version
• Forwarder installer added in Settings for easier launching of the application

Improvements
• Improved download performance and stability
• General tuning of the download system for better reliability

Fixes
• Fixed issues affecting downloads from Google Drive
• Various internal stability improvements
